metadata.description: Validated Agentic Collections from Red Hat Ecosystem Engineering

plugins.name: ocp-admin
plugins.description: Automation capabilities for OpenShift Container Platform cluster management, workload orchestration, security policies, and operational tasks.

plugins.name: rh-ai-engineer
plugins.description: Automation tools for AI/ML engineers working with Red Hat OpenShift AI (RHOAI). Deploy and manage models, pipelines, registries, workbenches, and serving runtimes on OpenShift AI.

plugins.name: rh-automation
plugins.description: Ansible Automation Platform governance, execution safety, and forensic troubleshooting tools for Red Hat automation engineers.

plugins.name: rh-developer
plugins.description: Plugins for building and deploying applications on Red Hat platforms.

plugins.name: rh-sre
plugins.description: Site reliability engineering tools and automation for managing Red Hat platforms and infrastructure.

plugins.name: rh-support-engineer
plugins.description: Technical support and troubleshooting tools for Red Hat products and platforms.

plugins.name: openshift-virtualization
plugins.description: Virtual machine management and automation for OpenShift Virtualization and KubeVirt workloads.
